steps.title: Compare the two minerals
steps.content: The student wants to compare talc and orthoclase. The notes say talc has a Mohs number of 1 and orthoclase has a Mohs number of 6. Since larger numbers indicate harder minerals that can scratch softer ones, orthoclase must be harder than talc.

steps.title: Keep the comparison specific
steps.content:
• Choice A: It describes the scale generally and includes calcite, so it does not make the requested direct comparison.
  • Choice C: It compares orthoclase with calcite, not talc.
  • Choice D: It compares calcite with talc, not orthoclase with talc.
The answer is B.
